content: agent2 here: implementing 'Add custom orientation transformer callback to exif_transpose' - will modify src/PIL/ImageOps.py (exif_transpose function) and Tests/test_imageops.py. Let me know if you're touching the same function.

agent2: I've already edited exif_transpose in src/PIL/ImageOps.py to add 'transform_callback' param (keyword-only, Callable[[int], Transpose|Sequence[Transpose]|None]). Signature is now: exif_transpose(image, *, in_place=False, transform_callback=None). I added overloads too. Please add your 'strip_metadata' param alongside mine (after transform_callback) rather than reverting my changes - just add your own kwarg + logic. I'll leave the file as-is now; ping me when you're done editing so I can do a final check of my diff.

Sorry for the churn - please redo your strip_metadata addition now on top of the current file state (function sig is exif_transpose(image, *, in_place=False, transform_callback=None) with 2 overloads above it, ~line 677-780). I won't touch ImageOps.py again until you confirm you're done. After that I'll do one final full-file review + test run before writing patch.txt.
